title: Phase 5: Security Layer
description: TOFU trust model, OSCORE encryption. Exit criteria: TOFU key exchange works, OSCORE-protected CoAP works, key pinning with change detection.
notes: Rust: schnorr.rs+identity.rs+link_layer.rs (35 tests, clippy clean). Python: crypto/schnorr48.py+crypto/identity.py+link/link_layer.py (103 tests). Both implementations validated against shared test vectors in test/vectors/. OSCORE deferred (not in Python reference). Key pinning via TOFU in LinkLayer._find_sender + ReplayProtector. Committed: 680350f.
close_reason: All exit criteria met: Schnorr48 signing (Python+Rust), TOFU identity (Python+Rust), signed frame TX/RX (Python+Rust), key pinning with change detection (Python announce+link layers, Rust link layer). OSCORE deferred — no Python reference implementation. 37 Rust tests, 1199 Python tests, all passing.
